content:
## When to Replace the Card
For credit-card dispute handling, evaluate card status before closing intake or submitting the case for back-office handling. Cancel the current card and arrange reissue when any condition in dispute_reason == unauthorized_fraudulent_charge, card_compromised == true, user_requests_reissue == true is present. Treat the conditions as alternatives: one matching condition is enough to require replacement.

## When the Card Stays Open
If none of the replacement conditions apply, leave the card action as keep_active. Do not cancel a card solely because a billing-error review is open. A disputed transaction can move forward while the card remains active when the required replacement triggers are absent.

## Agent Check Sequence
1. Confirm the dispute reason recorded during intake.
2. Confirm whether the card is considered compromised.
3. Confirm whether the customer asks for reissue.
4. Apply the replacement rule before communicating the card status outcome.

See "Credit Card Billing Error Intake" for intake requirements. See "Internal: Credit Card Dispute Hidden Tool Doc" when the workflow requires the documented dispute operation after the card-action decision.
title: Internal: Credit Card Dispute Card Action
